{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = The Bridge
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Bridge]] is up again.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“I’ve got to run back. The Bridge is up again, and my three days is almost burned up.”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
